title: Institutional Home and Host Requirements
subtitle: What a durable home for Sutton SignWriting infrastructure would need to provide
summary: A generalized public entry describing the functions a university, lab, institute, nonprofit, or consortium would need to provide in order to house Sutton SignWriting responsibly.
synopsis: Sutton SignWriting needs a durable institutional route, but the public case should not depend on any one institution before formal commitments exist. This entry generalizes the host-home logic: what an institutional home would provide, what it would not need to invent, what minimum commitments matter, and how grants, data stewardship, technical maintenance, international support, and community relationships fit together.
